name: droppy
tagline: droppy is a self-hosted file storage server with a web interface.
description:
droppy is a self-hosted file storage server with a web interface.


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  droppy:
    image: ghcr.io/droppyjs/droppy:v0.0.6
    volumes:
      - droppy-config:/config
      - droppy-files:/files
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42026:8989
volumes:
  droppy-config: null
  droppy-files: null
